menu_items.name: Chicken with Broccoli
menu_items.description: Tender chicken stir-fried with fresh broccoli florets in a savory garlic sauce.

menu_items.name: Kung Pao Chicken
menu_items.description: Diced chicken with peanuts, vegetables, and dried chilies in a spicy sauce.

menu_items.name: Sesame Chicken
menu_items.description: Crispy chicken in a sweet sesame glaze topped with toasted sesame seeds.

menu_items.name: General Tso's Chicken
menu_items.description: Crispy chicken tossed in a tangy, mildly spicy General Tso sauce.

menu_items.name: Lemon Chicken
menu_items.description: Lightly battered chicken in a refreshing lemon sauce.

menu_items.name: Chicken with Mixed Vegetables
menu_items.description: Sliced chicken stir-fried with a colorful array of fresh vegetables.

menu_items.name: Sweet and Sour Chicken
menu_items.description: Battered chicken with pineapple and peppers in a classic sweet and sour sauce.

menu_items.name: Chicken in Black Bean Sauce
menu_items.description: Tender chicken sautéed with peppers and onions in a rich black bean sauce.

menu_items.name: Moo Shu Chicken
menu_items.description: Shredded chicken with cabbage, mushrooms, and egg, served with pancakes and hoisin.

menu_items.name: Orange Chicken
menu_items.description: Crispy chicken pieces in a zesty orange peel sauce.
